task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ServiceDesk Plus dashboard or main interface is visible, indicating the agent has bypassed the login screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the Change Management Risk Assessment configuration page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Risk Assessment' settings or configuration page under the Change Management admin section is visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the first question's name and description are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A question titled 'Deployment Complexity' with the description 'Is the deployment process automated or manual?' is visible in the risk assessment form.

task_completion.description: Verify the first question's choices and their corresponding scores are configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The choices 'Fully Automated' (Score: 1), 'Partially Automated' (Score: 3), and 'Manual / Complex' (Score: 5) are visible and associated with the 'Deployment Complexity' question.

task_completion.description: Verify the second question's name and description are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A question titled 'Service Redundancy' with the description 'Does the affected service have failover capability?' is visible in the risk assessment form.

task_completion.description: Verify the second question's choices and their corresponding scores are configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The choices 'High Availability Cluster' (Score: 1) and 'Single Point of Failure' (Score: 5) are visible and associated with the 'Service Redundancy' question.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the ServiceDesk Plus web interface in a browser, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent entered the data into the correct application fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The questions, descriptions, choices, and scores should be entered into their respective input fields within the Risk Assessment configuration UI, not pasted as a single text block into a random text area.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should clearly be ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus, not a text editor, notes app, or mock interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires adding exactly two questions to the Change Management Risk Assessment. Question 1: Name: 'Deployment Complexity', Description: 'Is the deployment process automated or manual?', Choices: 'Fully Automated' (Score: 1), 'Partially Automated' (Score: 3), 'Manual / Complex' (Score: 5). Question 2: Name: 'Service Redundancy', Description: 'Does the affected service have failover capability?', Choices: 'High Availability Cluster' (Score: 1), 'Single Point of Failure' (Score: 5).
